description_long: This is a classical-style marble sculpture depicting a partially draped, seated female figure. The figure is missing both arms and part of the head, suggesting it is an ancient or intentionally fragmented work. The figure sits on a roughly hewn stone base, with detailed folds in the drapery cascading over her legs and to the ground. Her hair is styled in a classical manner, with visible braids or curls at the back. The surface of the sculpture is smooth with some weathering, giving it an aged appearance. The overall form is elegant and lifelike, with careful attention to anatomical detail and fabric texture.
description: A partially draped, seated female figure in marble, missing arms and part of the head, with detailed drapery and a classical, weathered appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the seated female figure, missing arms and part of the head, with detailed drapery and exposed torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped fabric over the legs and the profile of the head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with braided hair and the stone base supporting the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the curvature of the back, the drapery, and the figure's seated posture.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
